metadata.description: A forge for Claude Code skills and plugins.

plugins.name: cooking-skill
plugins.description: Help users decide what to cook and how to cook it. Default to Chinese home cooking with practical technique guidance.

plugins.name: docs-organization
plugins.description: Organize project documentation by size, audience, and freshness. Slim bloated CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md and decide where docs should live.

plugins.name: brainforge-autoresearch
plugins.description: Autonomous prompt optimization for AI agent skills. Runs controlled experiments using the Karpathy autoresearch pattern.
